title: Refund approval threshold
rule: Refunds, credits, and reversals require billing approval before support provides written confirmation.

title: Security and data deletion approval
rule: Data deletion, access revocation, and security confirmation require identity verification and security escalation.

title: Enterprise SLA escalation
rule: Enterprise critical tickets approaching SLA breach require immediate engineering or customer-success escalation with an assigned owner.

title: No compensation promises
rule: Support agents must not promise compensation, credits, refunds, or legal remedies without documented approval.

title: Evidence citation requirement
rule: Agent recommendations must cite internal KB or policy evidence IDs for each material claim.
